flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Vincennes University fell 81% between 2021 and 2024 (16.9% → 3.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Vincennes University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.7k vs 4.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Vincennes University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1k → 3.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Vincennes University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.1k).
